name: velvet
description: Velvet — a modular, locally-hosted Discord bot with a web control panel.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @velvet/shared && npm run build -w @velvet/server && npm run build -w @velvet/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @velvet/shared && npm run typecheck -w @velvet/server && npm run typecheck -w @velvet/web
